sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect the information you provide when you create an account, such as your name, email address, and profile details. We also collect usage data to improve our services.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.body: Your information is used to operate the platform, connect freelancers with clients, personalize your experience, and keep your account secure.

sections.title: Sharing Your Information
sections.body: We never sell your personal data. Information is shared only with the parties needed to deliver a service you requested, or when required by law.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.body: We apply industry-standard safeguards to protect your data. No method of transmission is fully secure, so we encourage you to use a strong, unique password.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.body: You can access, update, or delete your personal information at any time from your account settings, or by contacting our support team.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, reach us at privacy@example.com.
